title: asterolasia mollis
intro: Asterolasia mollis, also known as the soft astrowort, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to eastern Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Asterolasia mollis include its ability to soothe and calm the skin, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
